_comment: Copy to profile.json (gitignored) and make it yours. This is the ONE file that describes you; the AI scores every posting against candidate.summary + role_ranking.

candidate.name: Your Name
candidate.summary: One or two sentences: who you are and what you're targeting. This is what the AI scores each posting against. e.g. 'CS student targeting backend / cloud internships; Python, AWS, Docker, some Kubernetes.'

categories._comment: Keyword lists per priority bucket. 'security' = your top-priority bucket (always kept, shown first); 'relevant_swe' = adjacent. Rename/retune freely — these feed the coarse keyword filter before the AI refines.
